subject: session date
fact: The session took place on Dec 30th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 30th, 2025

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a Yugoloth who appears as a handsome half-elf to most observers.
source_quote: appearing as a handsome half-elf to most

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass's true form is a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws.
source_quote: revealed as a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass owns a palace with an opulent office and hanging gardens below.
source_quote: Maram il Vass's opulent office

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass has been searching for Felkur for some time.
source_quote: he had been searching for Felkur for some time

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass made a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur.
source_quote: he had made a deal with a devil who sought Felkur

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass owes a specific magical item to another demon.
source_quote: retrieve a specific magical item that Maram il Vass owed to another demon

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used his magical abilities to create two sets of armor.
source_quote: Felkur had used his magical abilities to create two sets of armor

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur claimed the armor sets came from bandit camps and a raided castle.
source_quote: He claimed the sets came from bandit camps and a raided castle

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur crafted a no-betrayal clause into the contract with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Felkur then crafted a no-betrayal clause

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur suggested sealing the deal with a magical binding ritual.
source_quote: Felkur suggested sealing the deal with a magical binding ritual

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur receives additional protection against fear while under the terms of the contract.
source_quote: granting Felkur additional protection against fear while under its terms

subject: Daein
fact: Daein rolled a natural 20 on a deception check.
source_quote: Daein rolls a natural 20 on a deception check

subject: Daein
fact: Daein wove Maram il Vass's suggestion about Graz'zt's Chosen into the party's story.
source_quote: Daein seized the opportunity and wove the suggestion into their story

subject: Daein
fact: Daein recognized Chasme Demons as intelligent taskmasters from the Abyss.
source_quote: Daein recognized them as intelligent taskmasters from the Abyss

subject: Daein
fact: Daein shouted for the drow prisoner during the battle.
source_quote: Daein shouted for the drow prisoner

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attacked a Chasme Demon with his longsword.
source_quote: Daein charged forward with his longsword, striking one of the demons repeatedly

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Action Surge to make additional attacks.
source_quote: calling upon his reserves of strength for additional attacks

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim used enhanced sight to reveal Maram il Vass's true form.
source_quote: revealed as a seven-foot-tall demon with jaws and claws to Bramgrim's enhanced sight

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon radiant energy to strike at the demons.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon radiant energy to strike at the demons

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a spectral weapon to aid in the fight.
source_quote: summoning a spectral weapon to aid in the fight

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians to damage the demons and slow their movements.
source_quote: Bramgrim called forth spectral guardians that swirled around him in a protective aura, damaging the demons and slowing their movements

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim directed his spectral weapon to shatter the chain holding a cage.
source_quote: directed his spectral weapon to strike at the chain holding one of the cages, and it shattered

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim took a critical strike from a Chasme Demon's proboscis.
source_quote: taking a vicious critical strike from the demon's proboscis

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's life force was damaged by the critical strike.
source_quote: dealt massive damage to both his body and his life force

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim disengaged and fled up the stairs with the others.
source_quote: He disengaged and fled up the stairs with the others

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked a Chasme Demon with her hunter's focus.
source_quote: Akritas marked one of the demons with her hunter's focus

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas loosed arrows at the marked demon.
source_quote: before loosing arrows at it

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas was telepathically threatened with terror and pain by a Chasme Demon.
source_quote: telepathically threatening Akritas with promises of terror and pain

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas repositioned herself and continued her barrage of arrows.
source_quote: Akritas repositioned herself and continued her barrage of arrows

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a drow prisoner held in a cage in the hanging gardens.
source_quote: retrieve their prisoner

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was freed from the cage by the party.
source_quote: freed drow, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan was enslaved for five years by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Teegan's revelation about being enslaved for five years

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan was enslaved by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: traumatized commoners Teegan and Drystan who had escaped enslavement by Maram il Vass

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is a deep gnome guard.
source_quote: Gabberforth, the deep gnome guard

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon spoke in a disturbing polyphonic voice that buzzed and clicked.
source_quote: speaking in a disturbing polyphonic voice that buzzed and clicked

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon taunted Bramgrim about finding the weakness in his stony exterior.
source_quote: taunting him about finding the weakness in his stony exterior

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon attempted to attack Akritas with its proboscis.
source_quote: lunged at her with its proboscis

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: A Chasme Demon commented that Maram il Vass would need new guardians.
source_quote: commenting that Maram il Vass would need new guardians for his prisoners

subject: Hag
fact: Three hags arrived to take over guard duty.
source_quote: three hags arriving to take over guard duty

subject: Hag
fact: The hags muttered complaints about the quality of hired help.
source_quote: mutting complaints about the quality of hired help

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: Two Chasme Demons appeared in the cavern.
source_quote: Two Chasme Demons appeared

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: Chasme Demons are covered in buzzing insects.
source_quote: their bodies covered in buzzing insects

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: Chasme Demons have resistance to fire, cold, and lightning.
source_quote: resistance to fire, cold, and lightning

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: Chasme Demons produce a droning sound that causes necrotic damage.
source_quote: necrotic droning sound they produced

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: One Chasme Demon flew toward Bramgrim.
source_quote: One demon flew toward Bramgrim

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: The Owlbear lashed out with its claws, tearing into the Chasme Demon's flesh.
source_quote: the Owlbear lashed out with its claws, tearing into the creature's flesh

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: One Chasme Demon fell and dissolved into dust.
source_quote: One demon fell, dissolving into dust

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically threatened Akritas.
source_quote: telepathically threatening Akritas with promises of terror and pain

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: The remaining Chasme Demon attacked Bramgrim with a critical hit.
source_quote: vicious critical strike from the demon's proboscis

subject: Owlbear
fact: An Owlbear stood ready to strike during the battle.
source_quote: The Owlbear stood ready to strike

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear grabbed the falling chain and held it steady.
source_quote: The Owlbear heroically grabbed the falling chain and held it steady

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear lowered the prisoner's cage to safety.
source_quote: As the Owlbear carefully lowered the prisoner's cage

subject: Graz'zt's Chosen
fact: Rumors exist of Graz'zt's Chosen being killed in Hillsfar.
source_quote: rumors of Graz'zt's Chosen being killed in Hillsfar

subject: Maram il Vass's office
fact: The party stood in Maram il Vass's opulent office.
source_quote: The party stood in Maram il Vass's opulent office

subject: Hanging Gardens
fact: Maram il Vass directed the party to the hanging gardens below to retrieve the prisoner.
source_quote: directed them to the hanging gardens below to retrieve their prisoner

subject: Underground Chamber
fact: The party emerged into a vast underground chamber one hundred feet tall.
source_quote: emerged into a vast underground chamber, one hundred feet tall

subject: Underground Chamber
fact: The chamber was bathed in the eerie pale glow of luminescent fungus.
source_quote: bathed in the eerie pale glow of luminescent fungus clinging to the ceiling

subject: Underground Chamber
fact: Heavy chains ran the length of the cavern, suspending numerous cages.
source_quote: Heavy chains ran the length of the cavern, suspending numerous cages

subject: Storage Room
fact: The party descended through a storage room filled with empty containers.
source_quote: descended through a storage room filled with empty containers

subject: Magical Armor Sets
fact: Felkur created two sets of armor that would appear genuine for eight hours.
source_quote: create two sets of armor, which would appear genuine for the next eight hours

subject: Key
fact: Maram il Vass handed the party a key to the hanging gardens.
source_quote: Maram il Vass handed them a key

subject: Key
fact: The party took the key from the door.
source_quote: The party takes the key from the door

subject: Cage
fact: A cage containing the prisoner was suspended by a chain.
source_quote: suspending numerous cages from floor to ceiling

subject: Armor Presentation
fact: The party presented two magically created armor sets to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: The party presents two magically created armor sets to Maram il Vass

subject: Deception Success
fact: Daein successfully deceived Maram il Vass about the armor's origin.
source_quote: successfully deceives Maram il Vass about the armor's origin

subject: Descent
fact: The party descended a long staircase from worked stone to rough cavern walls.
source_quote: down a long staircase that transformed from worked stone to rough cavern walls

subject: Chasme Encounter
fact: The party heard screaming and the sound of creatures rushing toward them.
source_quote: they heard screaming and the sound of creatures rushing toward them

subject: Battle Start
fact: Battle erupted in the cavern.
source_quote: Battle erupted in the cavern

subject: Chain Shattering
fact: Bramgrim's spectral weapon shattered the chain holding a cage.
source_quote: it shattered under the magical assault

subject: Demon Defeat
fact: One Chasme Demon was defeated and dissolved into dust.
source_quote: One demon fell, dissolving into dust

subject: Tactical Retreat
fact: The party made the tactical decision to retreat rather than continue the fight.
source_quote: The party made the tactical decision to retreat rather than continue the fight

subject: Hag Arrival
fact: Three hags arrived to take over guard duty.
source_quote: glimpsed three hags arriving to take over guard duty

subject: Contract Negotiation
fact: Felkur engaged in an intense negotiation with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Felkur, with encouragement from Daein, engaged in an intense negotiation with the master of contracts

subject: Contract Finalization
fact: The contract was finalized with magical force.
source_quote: The contract was finalized with magical force

subject: Felkur's Stolen Item
fact: Maram il Vass revealed he had been searching for Felkur connected to an item the artificer allegedly stole.
source_quote: connected to an item the artificer had allegedly stolen

subject: Mysterious Item Retrieval
fact: Felkur is bound to retrieve a specific magical item that Maram il Vass owes to another demon.
source_quote: binding him to retrieve the mysterious item that Maram il Vass required
